observations.axis: Vision of Family vs. Harsh Reality
observations.summary: Dan's vision of a warm, ordinary, and unhaunted family contrasts sharply with the cold and hard nature of his actual reality, creating a tension between longing and harshness.

left_evidence.quote: The vision of it—a whole, unhaunted family, warm and ordinary and unhaunted—struck him like a blade of light

right_evidence.quote: everything cold and hard in his reality

bridge_evidence.quote: Dan wavered. The hunger of it was a hole that went straight through to the other side of the world.
